dict.string: WhisperNote needs access to your microphone to record audio for transcription.
WhisperNote does not use the camera but may request this permission for audio capture.
WhisperNote needs access to save recordings to your selected folder.
WhisperNote needs access to save recordings to your selected folder.
WhisperNote needs access to save recordings to your selected folder.
WhisperNote needs access to save recordings to your selected folder.
